/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/booster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c__pyext.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,booster_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-314-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/booster_msgs/booster_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-314-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/booster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/booster_msgs/_booster_msgs_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/baro/Downloads/Football/K1_Football_Demo/build/booster_msgs/rosidl_generator_py/booster_msgs:/home/baro/Downloads/Football/K1_Football_Demo/build/booster_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/booster_msgs/libbooster_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/libpython3.14.so libbooster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libbooster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
